overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of an underground cyberpunk tunnel system from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves through neon-lit concrete corridors, past futuristic vehicles, security mesh gates, and sections with overhead skylights revealing the sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground multi-lane roadway with neon lighting

events.description: futuristic teal car drives past from left to right across the intersection ahead
black SUV passes by in the opposite direction on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the underground roadway, staying near the right sidewalk while observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: teal futuristic car driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: exposed concrete ceiling with industrial fluorescent tube lights running lengthwise
red painted concrete walls with white graffiti tags and industrial markings
double yellow lines marking the center of the multi-lane road
large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the tunnel ceiling at regular intervals
illuminated digital billboards mounted on the tunnel walls displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark underground cyberpunk tunnel with red walls and industrial lighting. The camera walks forward along the roadway as futuristic vehicles pass by, including a distinctive teal car. The environment features concrete support pillars, digital billboards, and yellow road markings in a neon-lit setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: security walkway with metal mesh gates and gated storage areas

events.description: moving from the open road to the sidewalk section lined with metal security mesh gates
passing floor-to-ceiling metal mesh gates revealing green and cyan neon-lit interior spaces behind

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk next to the metal mesh security gates, observing the gated side rooms with neon lighting visible through the chain link

notable_agents.action: dark colored car driving away down the tunnel into the distance

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling metal chain-link mesh gates with wooden panels blocking off side rooms and storage areas
green and cyan neon lights visible through the mesh gates illuminating the gated interiors

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions to a sidewalk section lined with metal mesh security gates on the left. Behind the gates, green and cyan neon lights illuminate gated storage areas. The red tunnel walls now appear on the right as the camera continues walking forward, with occasional vehicles visible on the road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel section with overhead skylights and illuminated directional signage

events.description: natural daylight becomes visible through large overhead skylights as the camera approaches the opening
dark vehicle passes by on the right side of the road moving in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing through the tunnel as it opens up with overhead skylights, returning to walk along the road edge near the yellow directional arrows

entered.detail: large rectangular openings in the ceiling showing the bright sky above and allowing natural light to enter
illuminated yellow chevron arrows mounted on the wall indicating traffic direction
large digital billboard with 'SAMURAI' text and red cyberpunk graphics

segments.scene_description: The tunnel opens up with large overhead skylights allowing natural daylight to mix with the artificial neon lighting. The camera passes illuminated yellow directional arrows and a large digital 'SAMURAI' billboard on the right. The road surface appears wet and reflective as vehicles continue to pass through the semi-covered section.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide tunnel section with large illuminated skylights and reflective wet pavement

events.description: passing directly under large bright skylights creating dramatic pools of natural light on the wet road surface
slight turn to the right while continuing forward through the widest section of the tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking under the large skylights, observing the dramatic light patterns reflecting off the wet road surface and the massive concrete support structures

entered.detail: water-covered asphalt creating mirror-like reflections of the overhead lights and skylights

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the camera walking through the widest section of the tunnel under massive overhead skylights. The wet road surface creates dramatic reflections of the natural light and fluorescent tubes. Large concrete support pillars line the center of the road as the tunnel stretches ahead toward the bright exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, neon-lit underground tunnel that gradually opens into a bright, semi-covered thoroughfare. It begins on a roadway flanked by red walls and industrial lighting, moving past concrete pillars and futuristic vehicles, including a distinctive teal car. As the camera shifts toward a sidewalk, the environment transitions to a corridor of metal mesh security gates glowing with green and cyan neon lights. The scene then expands as overhead skylights introduce natural daylight, blending with the artificial glow to illuminate wet, reflective roads and a large digital Samurai billboard. Finally, the camera advances through the widest section of the tunnel, passing massive concrete supports under a canopy of light as the path stretches toward a bright exit.
